synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0914 Important: Oracle Linux 9 gimp security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0914

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0914.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
gimp-3.0.4-1.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm
gimp-libs-3.0.4-1.el9_7.2.i686.rpm
gimp-libs-3.0.4-1.el9_7.2.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
gimp-3.0.4-1.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm
gimp-libs-3.0.4-1.el9_7.2.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/gimp-3.0.4-1.el9_7.2.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-14422
CVE-2025-14423
CVE-2025-14424
CVE-2025-14425




Description of changes:

[2:3.0.4-1.2]
- fix CVE-2025-14422
- fix CVE-2025-14423
- fix CVE-2025-14424
- fix CVE-2025-14425

[2:3.0.4-1.1]
- fix CVE-2025-10920
- fix CVE-2025-10921
- fix CVE-2025-10922
- fix CVE-2025-10923
- fix CVE-2025-10924
- fix CVE-2025-10925
- fix CVE-2025-10934
